titleStmt.title: SII 23.585: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 585. (A.R. No. 585 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 2nd and 3rd tiers of the same base; left of entrance

summary.p: This is built in at the end. The date portion is lost. It seems to record the grant of a village by name Toṭṭimeṭṭai alias Śokkadēvaviḷāgam by the chief Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siddharasa ‘ruling Pottappi-nāḍu,’ for the expenses of a festival in the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ. The same donor probably made another gift in the next year (for the formation of a road for the god's procession ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etadābrahma sambhūta samsiddhapuram raca śrīviṣṇulo kanāthasya śāsa nam sarvamaṅgalam . svasti caraṇasaroruhavihitavi—
ratnadipāhita kumārāṅkuśa nayyanasiṅha śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaraṉ siddharasan pottappi nāṭāḷāniṟkka śakavarṣam—
tiruṉāḷ tiruveyaiyiṉāḷ Adhirājentra maṇṭalattu meṟppākkai ṉāṭṭu toṭṭimeyai Āṉa cokkattevaviḷākamāna—
sarvvāya śuddhiyāka Ācantrā[*r]kka kālam cellakkaṭavitāka cokkap perumāḷ tirumunne nirvārttuk kuṭutten maturān=taka—
kuttiṉāṉ vātattil paṭuvān Itaṉ piṟṟai Āṇṭu koṭaittiru ṉāḷil paḻaiyapaṟaiyaṟaiccerikku kiḻakku ttaṭavi peruvaḻikku teṟ—
koṭaittiruṉāḷappi cellakkaṭavatāka cokkapperumāḷukku tiru munne nirvārttukuṭutteṉ maturān=takap pottappiccoḻa siddha—
Digital edition of SII 23.585 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
